penalties.description: Task appears incomplete - fundamental disagreement on task completion status requires conservative assessment

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion status. Claude reported incomplete task with ligating loop material instead of expected suture setup, while GPT reported completed task with slit closure penalty. Given the fundamental disagreement on whether the correct task was performed, conservative incomplete_task penalty applied.

claude_value.description: Task appears incomplete as no suture cutting or final assessment phase was observed in the video frames.

gpt_value.description: Residual slit gap visible after the final knot.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's observation that ligating loop material was used instead of expected suture setup indicates fundamental task execution error, which takes precedence over slit closure assessment
GPT's timing aligns with reported task completion phases, while Claude's longer time reflects incomplete task assessment
If task was incomplete as Claude suggests, the additional phases reported by GPT would not be valid
